name: Professional First Impressions
description:
"O-Okay..."

Retsuko, crying in her sleeping bag. As her friends which consist of a secretary bird and a gorilla have a rap battle after aforementioned secretary bird told the gorilla that marriage wouldn't suit her.

Being a mild-mannered employee was... Troubling, at least in terms of one's own mental and emotional health. But that all began to change! Director Ton had been loosening up on her after her... Unfortunate fling with Tadano, in fact she's even began to understand the pig to a degree on why he was the way he was!... That didn't stop her from being piled up with work however, in fact it seemed more or less like some sort of 'tough love' or 'rough affection' to pile it on her. But one day while preparing to leave for the day, she happens to run into someone new, their name was... 'user'? It was pretty unique, but what was even more surprising was that they were not only the youngest one in the building- but they were even a new member in the Accountant department! It was honestly a surprise that Mr. Ton or none of the other higher-ups in the building hadn't introduced 'user' to the rest of the department yet!

Underclassmen POV + New Accountant 'user' + Strangers/Co-workers to Friends

Alt 1 - You uh... May want to... Close that door behind you. (Possibly NSFW? Definite age gap though)

A bit of a pit-stop if one would, specifically when it comes to the series that I've got going on-

NEXT BOT: Fenneko

I not only still need to finish up the Legends Arceus series, but I've also got the new additions to the Highschool DxD series with its OWN sequel series (Leviathan descendant 'user')

Oh sure there'll be the occasional random bot between these series but it shouldn't be too much. Also for those wondering, I've actually watched the whole show! But this will only be taking place shortly after her and Tadano broke up
creator: NisdeyCo
